finding_results.notes: Kept the preservation lure in Kem's bodily exhaustion and the Conservatory image, cut the post-rescue thematic gloss after the girls' gesture, and reworked the camp north-road reflection so the repeated choice lands through concrete recall and his movement back to the fire.

summary: Compressed the duplicated preservation realization so Kem's comprehension lands once in the rubble and the later camp movement carries his continued southward choice through concrete detail and action.
